basic_details.short_information: NLC India (NLCIL) Manager (Secretarial) Notification 2026 has been released through Advertisement No. 07/2026 on the official website of NLCIL. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NLCIL Manager (Secretarial) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 36 years Age Relaxation: OBC: 3 years; PwBD: 10 years; Ex-Servicemen: as per GoI guidelines; max age 58 years

qualification.education_qualification: Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India
qualification.details: Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NLCIL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.nlc_india_nlcil: Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India

content_sections.heading: NLCIL Manager (Secretarial) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NLCIL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NLCIL Manager (Secretarial) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India

content_sections.heading: NLCIL Manager (Secretarial) Age Limit 2026

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NLCIL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NLCIL Manager (Secretarial) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NLCIL Manager (Secretarial) recruitment is 13th July 2026. Ensure all submissions are completed before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Manager (Secretarial) post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is to be a Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Manager (Secretarial) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Manager (Secretarial) post is 36 years. Age relaxations are applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Manager (Secretarial) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Manager (Secretarial) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 854. SC/ST candidates have a reduced fee of Rs. 354.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Manager (Secretarial) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Manager (Secretarial) position ranges from Rs. 70,000 to Rs. 2,00,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the NLCIL Manager (Secretarial) recruitment involves a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the NLCIL located?
faq.answer: NLC India Limited (NLCIL) is located in Neyveli, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 607801.

faq.question: Q9. When does the online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process for the NLCIL Manager (Secretarial) recruitment starts on 12th June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for OBC (3 years), PwBD (10 years), and Ex-Servicemen (as per GoI guidelines, max age 58 years).
